message:
polish(viz): DeliverablesTreeViz round 2/3 — motion + visual hierarchy

- Spring physics: detail panel transition upgraded from duration-based
  to spring (stiffness: 260, damping: 26) for natural panel swaps
- Folder arrow: CSS rotate replaced with Framer Motion spring animation
  (stiffness: 300, damping: 25) for organic expand/collapse feel
- Detail panel: heading scaled responsively (xl→2xl at md), description
  text lightened to slate-300 for better content/chrome separation
- All spring transitions respect prefers-reduced-motion (duration: 0)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
